formData.from: Commanding General, Training and Education Command
formData.subject: ANNUAL TRAINING REQUIREMENTS FOR FISCAL YEAR 2026

paragraphs.text: Per reference (a), all commands shall ensure completion of annual training requirements as outlined in enclosure (1). This letter establishes the training priorities and reporting procedures for FY26.

**Background.** The Marine Corps Training and Readiness Program requires all units to maintain proficiency in core competencies. Reference (b) directed commands to submit updated training plans by 1 March 2026.
All active duty and reserve component units shall complete the following mandatory training events not later than 30 September 2026:
Cyber Awareness Training (CAT) for all personnel with network access.
Annual combat marksmanship qualification per reference (a), Chapter 3.
Physical fitness testing in accordance with current Marine Corps Order on Physical Fitness.

Commanders shall submit training completion reports via the Training Information Management System (TIMS) on a quarterly basis. Units failing to meet the 90% completion threshold by end of third quarter will be required to submit a corrective action plan.
Resource allocation for this training plan is detailed in enclosure (2). Commands requiring additional funding shall submit requests through the chain of command not later than 1 February 2026.
